name: Khoros
description: Khoros — Enterprise community and customer care platform for social media management and online communities.

seo.title: Khoros — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Khoros: Khoros — Enterprise community and customer care platform for social media management and online communities.

when_to_use: Enterprise branded community with social media management
Unified customer care platform spanning social and community
Online community for a tech company with moderation tools
Social listening + community analytics for enterprise CX
Support deflection via self-service community forum

cons: UX feels dated for end users
review.verdict: An enterprise staple for consumer brands, rarely the right call for modern SaaS community teams.
review.best_for: Large consumer brands running big support communities and social care at scale.
review.not_for: SaaS communities, creators, or anyone wanting a modern, lightweight platform.
